headline: Berkshire Hathaway Just Notched an 8-Day Losing Streak. It’s a Good Time to Get Exposure to the Conglomerate.
summary: The Berkshire performance is disappointing since the company is arguably the most defensive mega-cap stock in the market.

headline: Berkshire shares suffer longest losing streak in more than 7 years
summary: Shares of Berkshire Hathaway have lost ground for eight consecutive days. It is their longest losing streak since December of 2018.

raw.headline: Berkshire shares suffer longest losing streak in more than 7 years

headline: Analysis: A new oil shock is building. The next few weeks of war will be decisive for the economy.
summary: Energy markets are starting to reflect the growing risk of physical supply disruptions.
